title: Bladder Cancer Got More FDA Approvals in Twelve Months Than in the Previous Four Decades
description: In a single twelve-month window, bladder cancer accumulated more FDA approvals and Phase 3 trial wins than it had in the previous four decades combined — including a drug-releasing implant with an 82% response rate and a combination therapy that cut death risk in half. The press releases are celebrating. The data has caveats they won't mention. Here's what actually changed, and what still might not hold.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Bladder Cancer Killed People the Same Way for Forty Years. Five Trials Just Broke That.
